response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: Audio phonetically contradicts the Reference JSON identification (performer is Hakui Koyori, not Shiranami Ramune). 2. JSON Usage: Discarded name identification from Reference JSON; manual transcription used for dialogue. 3. Timing & Pacing: Normal conversational pace with a long musical interlude. Subtitles are tightly synchronized to vocal starts and ends.

subtitles.original: ただいまーとね。
subtitles.english: I'm back!

subtitles.original: よいしょ。
subtitles.english: Heave-ho.

subtitles.original: ちょっと待って、えーと...
subtitles.english: Wait a second, let's see...

subtitles.original: えーと、こうして... こうして...
subtitles.english: Um, like this... and like this...

subtitles.original: え、ラミたん来てくれた！
subtitles.english: Oh, Lamy-tan came to visit!

subtitles.original: ラミたん！
subtitles.english: Lamy-tan!

subtitles.original: あ、ちょっと待って。ラミたんの立ち絵とかがないのと...
subtitles.english: Ah, wait a second. I don't have Lamy-tan's character art ready, and...

subtitles.original: 今洗い物がここにゾワッとなってて...
subtitles.english: ...there's a whole pile of dishes right here...

subtitles.original: くっそ邪魔だから、まず洗い物を片して...
subtitles.english: ...and they're really in the way, so let me clear them first...

subtitles.original: やば、すご、すご！
subtitles.english: Oh man, this is amazing!

subtitles.original: サムネにも、あのタイトルにも、全く気配のない...
subtitles.english: She wasn't in the thumbnail or the title at all...

subtitles.original: ラミたんが、成功してなくても来てくれた！
subtitles.english: ...but Lamy-tan came, even though I haven't finished yet!

subtitles.original: あーだこーだ言ってもらおう。
subtitles.english: I'll have her give me some feedback.

subtitles.original: 洗い物優先やで。
subtitles.english: Cleaning dishes first.

subtitles.original: お客様優先しろやな、そこはな。
subtitles.english: I should really prioritize my guest, shouldn't I?

subtitles.original: 洗い物が今邪魔、マウスを動かすこともできない。
subtitles.english: The dishes are so in the way, I can't even move my mouse.

subtitles.original: うれぴー、うれぴー。
subtitles.english: So happy, so happy.

subtitles.original: 初めてこの料理配信でさ、一人で作るっつって作った料理を...
subtitles.english: This is the first time in a cooking stream where I've made something on my own...

subtitles.original: 誰かに食べてもらえるの初じゃね？
subtitles.english: ...and actually had someone eat it, isn't it?

subtitles.original: 一緒に作ろうとか、のはやったけど。
subtitles.english: We've done 'let's cook together' streams before, though.

subtitles.original: ちょっ、ちょっ、ちょっ、ちょっ、ちょっと... ちょっと待ってね。
subtitles.english: Wait, wait, wait, wait, just a... just a second.

subtitles.original: あと10分くらいあるから、ちょっと皆様お待ちいただいていいですか？
subtitles.english: There's about 10 minutes left, so could everyone please wait for a bit?

subtitles.original: ラミたんが来てくれましたー！
subtitles.english: Lamy-tan has come to visit!

subtitles.original: すごい、普通に来てくれるじゃん！
subtitles.english: Wow, she really just showed up!

subtitles.original: ありがとう！マジで！
subtitles.english: Thank you! Seriously!

subtitles.original: こよもあのダンスレッスン後のジャージやから似たようなもんや。
subtitles.english: Koyo is also in her jersey after dance lessons, so we're basically the same.

subtitles.original: あ、ヘアも...
subtitles.english: Ah, my hair too...

subtitles.original: はい、いってらっしゃい。
subtitles.english: Okay, off you go.

subtitles.original: 今、立ち絵を保存してました。
subtitles.english: I was just saving her character art.

subtitles.original: わーい！
subtitles.english: Yay!

subtitles.original: え、うれぴー。
subtitles.english: I'm so happy.

subtitles.original: 無事成功するかな？ドキドキ、ドキドキなんだけど。
subtitles.english: I wonder if it'll be a success? I'm so nervous.

subtitles.original: 今、煮込み中ですと。
subtitles.english: It's currently simmering.

subtitles.original: ラミたんをここに... よいしょ、添えて。
subtitles.english: Let me place Lamy-tan here... heave-ho.

subtitles.original: タイトルのところを...
subtitles.english: And at the title...

subtitles.original: これでね、いつもこよが言ってる「美味しい」が...
subtitles.english: With this, whether the 'delicious' that Koyo always says...

subtitles.original: 本当なのかどうかがみんなに証明されるから。
subtitles.english: ...is actually true or not will be proven to everyone.

subtitles.original: あ、メイド服。うん、下がジャージなだけで。
subtitles.english: Oh, the maid outfit. Yeah, it's just that I'm wearing jersey pants underneath.

subtitles.original: みんなに見えるところはちゃんとアレです。
subtitles.english: The parts everyone can see are proper.

subtitles.original: いい匂いがするよー！
subtitles.english: It smells so good!

subtitles.original: 本当に、本当に？くつろいでてね。
subtitles.english: Really, really? Please make yourself at home.

subtitles.original: あ、お茶出すね、お茶。
subtitles.english: Oh, I'll get some tea.

subtitles.original: お茶でいい？今ね、煮込んでる間だから大丈夫。
subtitles.english: Is tea okay? It's fine since it's just simmering now.

subtitles.original: ぱ、パン一じゃない。そう、下ちゃんと履いてる。
subtitles.english: I-I'm not in my underwear. Yes, I'm wearing pants.

subtitles.original: もしかしたら来るかもって時にパン一でやらんよ！
subtitles.english: I wouldn't be in my underwear when someone might come over!

subtitles.original: 上、ありがとう。
subtitles.english: The top, thank you.

subtitles.original: はい、お茶どうぞー。
subtitles.english: Here, have some tea.

subtitles.original: みんな、聞こえたよ、おるよ！
subtitles.english: Everyone, you heard her, she's here!

subtitles.original: おるよー、ラミたんおるよー！
subtitles.english: She's here, Lamy-tan is here!

subtitles.original: 今ね、ちょっと思ったよりこよりが切るの遅くて、時間がかかっていて。
subtitles.english: I was a bit slower at cutting things than I thought, so it's taking some time.
